products.title: Boston Fern
products.description: A lush, feathery fern perfect for adding a touch of greenery to any indoor space. Easy to care for and ideal for hanging baskets or shelves.

products.title: Monstera Deliciosa
products.description: A striking tropical plant known for its large, split leaves. Brings a bold, modern aesthetic to your home while thriving in indirect light.

products.title: Peace Lily
products.description: Elegant and low-maintenance, the Peace Lily features glossy leaves and delicate white blooms. Perfect for brightening quieter corners of your home.

products.title: Snake Plant (Sansevieria)
products.description: A hardy, air-purifying plant with upright, architectural leaves. Extremely resilient and perfect for beginners or low-light environments.

products.title: Fiddle Leaf Fig
products.description: A popular statement plant with large, violin-shaped leaves. Ideal for adding height and character to living rooms or open spaces.

products.title: Calathea Orbifolia
products.description: Known for its stunning patterned foliage, this plant adds a decorative touch with its soft, round leaves and subtle striping.
